message:
feat(fastmcp): client builder, server proxy, and comprehensive test suite

Major enhancements to the FastMCP framework, improving client construction,
adding server-side proxy capabilities, and implementing extensive test coverage.

## Client Builder (crates/fastmcp-client/src/builder.rs) [+43 lines]
- Added fluent builder API for client configuration
- Implemented transport selection (stdio, HTTP, WebSocket)
- Added connection timeout configuration
- Implemented retry policies with exponential backoff
- Added authentication credential configuration

## Client Library (crates/fastmcp-client/src/lib.rs) [+107 lines]
- Enhanced client initialization with validation
- Added connection health monitoring
- Implemented automatic reconnection logic
- Added request/response logging hooks

## Server Proxy (crates/fastmcp-server/src/proxy.rs) [+429 lines, NEW]
- Implemented MCP server proxy for request forwarding
- Added load balancing between multiple backends
- Implemented request transformation/enrichment
- Added response caching with configurable TTL
- Implemented circuit breaker pattern for fault tolerance
- Added metrics collection for proxy operations

## Test Suite (crates/fastmcp-server/src/tests.rs) [+1455 lines]
- Comprehensive integration tests for server functionality
- Added tool invocation tests with various parameter types
- Implemented resource access tests
- Added prompt handling tests
- Implemented error scenario testing
- Added performance benchmarks for throughput

## Additional Test Infrastructure (crates/fastmcp/tests/) [NEW]
- Added end-to-end test scenarios
- Implemented mock server utilities
- Added test fixtures for common patterns

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
